tasks.label: run random test (compare)
tasks.command: g++ gen.cpp -o gen.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ${file} -o sol.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ans.cpp -o ans.exe -O2 -std=c++23; for($i=1; $i -le 20; $i++){cmd /c '.\gen.exe > in.txt && .\sol.exe < in.txt > out.txt && .\ans.exe < in.txt > ans.txt'; if(Compare-Object (Get-Content out.txt) (Get-Content ans.txt)) { code in.txt out.txt ans.txt; break }; }; rm gen.exe; rm sol.exe; rm ans.exe

tasks.label: run random test (judge)
tasks.command: g++ gen.cpp -o gen.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ${file} -o sol.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ judge.cpp -o judge.exe -O2 -std=c++23; for($i=1; $i -le 20; $i++){cmd /c '.\gen.exe > inout.txt && .\sol.exe < inout.txt >> inout.txt && .\judge.exe < inout.txt'; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { code inout.txt; break }; }; rm gen.exe; rm sol.exe; rm judge.exe
